author: Chris McClendon
name: 11L VE128 PartialRoPE LNScale Legal TTT 30ep
blurb: 11-layer depth-recurrence GPT with Value Embeddings (128d on layers 9-10), Partial RoPE (16/64), Layer-Norm Scale, XSA last 4, BigramHash(2048), legal score-first TTT (30-epoch SGD momentum=0.9, freeze=2), int6+zstd quantization, SWA, and Late QAT. Key discovery: SGD with 30 epochs per chunk yields -0.0184 BPB TTT gain, 2.7x more than 3-epoch baseline. Trained on 4xA100.
